entity.summary: Multi-chain automated-market-maker decentralized exchange operating across Ethereum, Base, HyperEVM, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Polygon, Monad, MegaETH, and BNB Chain with active liquidity pools and swap volume.
entity.notes: The current first-party Metric domain remains reachable. Current multi-chain TVL and Swap-event volume are independently reflected by DefiLlama across nine networks. Because public first-party technical documentation is limited, confidence remains medium and no exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, or implementation lineage is asserted.

evidence.title: Metric official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party domain identifies the Metric protocol and remains reachable as the official exchange surface.

evidence.title: Metric protocol profile and DEX metrics
evidence.notes: Current profile classifies Metric as an AMM DEX and reports non-zero TVL and Swap-event DEX volume across nine EVM networks, supporting active status without inventing first-party details that are not public.
